Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Leonardo Ramirez-Lopez. Author, maintainer.

  • Antoine Stevens. Author, contributor.

  • Claudio Orellano. Contributor.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Ramirez-Lopez, L., and Stevens, A., and Orellano, C., (2026). resemble: Regression and similarity evaluation for memory-based learning in spectral chemometrics. R package Vignette R package version 3.0.0.

@Manual{resemble-package,
  title = {resemble: Sample Retrieval and Local Learning in Spectral Chemometrics.},
  author = {Leonardo Ramirez-Lopez and Antoine Stevens and Claudio Orellano},
  publication = {R package Vignette},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 3.0.0},
  url = {https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=resemble},
